text.title: SOC2 Control-to-Repo Artifact Map Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether soc2-control-to-repo-artifact-map applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org hold SOC2 Type II OR is in audit window AND engineering owns infrastructure?

branch.conclusion: Author Markdown/YAML map in repo; treat as evidence-as-code.
Sync the map with the GRC tool; treat repo as source-of-truth.

example.description: When `yes AND no_grc_tool` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
